services.whySelected: The repo already uses Prisma identity, session, operation, and worker-job tables; reusing it avoids a second identity or queue system.
services.localDevelopmentBehavior: Local fallback identity is allowed only outside production; production reads must use durable Prisma storage.
services.githubActionsBehavior: Workflows receive DATABASE_URL through protected secrets and run diagnostics before worker or migration steps.
services.productionBehavior: Production must fail closed when durable identity or operation tables are unavailable.
remainingManualOperatorSteps: Promote only a successful network-enabled production trust audit.

services.selectedBackend: Existing provider-neutral identity email adapter; Resend is the only concrete production adapter currently implemented.
services.whySelected: The identity layer already centralizes token creation, sanitized delivery logs, and provider selection.
services.localDevelopmentBehavior: Development adapter writes metadata-only private outbox entries and never writes tokens to generated artifacts.
services.githubActionsBehavior: Production tests require protected email secrets and an allowlisted recipient; arbitrary workflow recipients are not trusted.
services.productionBehavior: Production readiness requires npm run email:production-test with confirmation, network enabled, durable queue processing, and provider acceptance.
remainingManualOperatorSteps: Set an authorized test recipient allowlist.

services.selectedBackend: Existing identity evidence storage boundary with encrypted local-development storage and production private object-storage configuration gate.
services.whySelected: The identity layer already keeps evidence separate from public civic caches, browser sessions, and generated artifacts.
services.localDevelopmentBehavior: Encrypted fixture-only local smoke tests may run with an explicit ephemeral development key flag.
services.githubActionsBehavior: Production evidence smoke tests require private storage variables and protected encryption-key secrets.
services.productionBehavior: Do not collect real residency evidence until encrypted upload/read/unauthorized-read/purge smoke tests pass against the configured private backend.

services.selectedBackend: Existing admin operations browser-session storage boundary with separate Playwright session key namespace.
services.whySelected: Authenticated source sessions are operational secrets and must stay separate from evidence storage and public source caches.
services.localDevelopmentBehavior: Fixture-only encrypted local smoke tests are allowed with an explicit ephemeral development key flag.
services.githubActionsBehavior: Workflow artifacts must include metadata-only audits and never raw storage state.
services.productionBehavior: Production readiness requires encrypted round-trip, expiry detection, revocation, and post-revocation denial.

services.selectedBackend: GitHub Actions durable worker plus local operator worker
services.whySelected: The repo already has IdentityJob queue primitives and an allowlisted operation runner.
services.localDevelopmentBehavior: npm run worker:smoke-test enqueues and claims a harmless internal job when durable storage is reachable.
services.githubActionsBehavior: identity-worker.yml runs scheduled/manual bounded batches, audits the queue, and uploads non-sensitive diagnostics.
services.productionBehavior: Production web requests enqueue work; bounded workers claim jobs, heartbeat, retry, and dead-letter through durable storage.
remainingManualOperatorSteps: Run npm run worker:smoke-test in a network-enabled durable environment.
Confirm worker heartbeat and queue health.

services.selectedBackend: Database-provider native backup/restore first; encrypted private-storage fallback only if provider-native backup is unavailable.
services.whySelected: Provider-native snapshots/PITR are safer than ad hoc dumps and avoid plaintext backup artifacts.
services.localDevelopmentBehavior: Commands write truthful refusal/status artifacts and never restore into the primary database.
services.githubActionsBehavior: Restore smoke tests require a protected isolated target and must upload only non-sensitive audit counts.
services.productionBehavior: Production trust remains blocked until backup status is verified and an isolated restore smoke test succeeds.
remainingManualOperatorSteps: Run npm run restore:smoke-test against an isolated target.

services.selectedBackend: Existing officials source registry, network retrieval, verification, reconciliation, guarded promotion, and coverage audit.
services.whySelected: The Carson City officials path is now a permanent parallel DataOps responsibility and already has guarded canonical promotion.
services.localDevelopmentBehavior: npm run officials:carson-city:sync performs retrieval, reconciliation, promotion guard, regeneration, and browse audit when network is enabled.
services.githubActionsBehavior: Officials refresh operations are allowlisted and must preserve source evidence artifacts.
services.productionBehavior: Canonical officials promotion requires clean reconciliation and governing-body guard success.
